title: Step S-SWQT-0022: 渲染态 HTML conformance、回归验证与文档收口

items.statement: 用离线可复现的 rendered HTML conformance、现有 Axe/浏览器矩阵、类型/构建/打包和文档同步证明整库 HTML-first 改进完整且可持续。

inScope: 代表性 Portal/consumer rendered HTML conformance gate
package docs、研究报告、质量矩阵和例外记录收口
全导出面最终审计与未替换复合 widget 理由表
outOfScope: 与本 Feature 无关的 workflow-numbering 历史迁移
无关 source-highlight 基线问题，除非它阻断本 Feature 变更验证且可安全局部修复

items.optionsTelos: 三层 gate：source policy + rendered conformance + accessibility/interaction。

externalDependencies: 离线 HTML validator 或固定依赖
items.axisPositioning: required: validation completeness + public package + standards freshness。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: 最终独立 Step 只做证据/门禁/文档闭环，不夹带新的高风险组件迁移。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: 允许系统临时目录中的 rendered HTML 与 validator report；owner=S0022；永久摘要写入 workflow review/completion；完成后清理；不得删除仓库无关文件。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: 源规则正负用例；多代表路由 rendered HTML；所有改动组件 DOM/keyboard；Axe；visual/browser matrix；pack consumer。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: Feature 全部 10 条 AC 建立 requirement-audit 行，并引用具体命令/DOM/文件证据。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: standards conformance -> offline validator；public API -> typecheck/packed consumer；interaction/layout -> browser；docs -> sync/tree；workflow -> validation/ledger/doctor。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 以变更前 audit findings 为负例，证明每项被 gate 捕获；对保留 custom widget 运行现有交互断言。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: 100% Feature acceptance criteria mapped to direct evidence
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 真实 AT/浏览器组合不可穷尽；记录人工抽查和未替换复合控件理由。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: 未来 WHATWG/ARIA/support-matrix 变化触发重新 audit。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 最终文档给维护者一条可执行准则、例外判断和验证命令，不复制完整标准表。
items.problemDefinition: 单次改代码不能证明整个导出库已梳理，也不能防止后续重新引入 HTML/ARIA 反模式。
items.requirementsDefinition: 离线可重复 conformance；全验收映射；项目规定 gates；准确区分新增回归与既有 baseline；docs/Agent surface 同步。
nonGoals: 不把远端 validator.nu 作为唯一 CI 依赖。
不以 Axe 绿替代 HTML conformance。
不声称未运行的外部/人工验证已通过。

plainLanguage.unclear: 为什么 Axe 已经通过还要 HTML validator。
plainLanguage.why: Axe 关注可访问性规则，不覆盖全部 HTML content model、obsolete attributes 和 author conformance。
plainLanguage.outcome: 三类检查各自证明标准结构、可访问性和真实交互。
plainLanguage.prose: 不是多跑一个工具，而是补齐 Axe 没有证明的那部分。

options.name: 离线 validator + source/browser gates
options.risk: 新增 dev dependency 与维护成本。
options.rejectWhen: validator 无法处理渲染 HTML。

options.name: CI 调远端 validator.nu
options.impact: 接近官方 checker 行为。
options.risk: 网络、限流与服务变化导致 flake。

recommendedOption.rationale: 门禁必须可重复、不能依赖远端；远端 validator 仅作补充 outside-in 证据。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: 允许新增小型 dev validation dependency 或等价本地工具。
recommendedOption.assumptionChanges: 若依赖过重，使用仓库脚本 + 固定 validator artifact，但不得降低验收覆盖。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 所有动作共享 completion evidence/CI integration 不变量。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 文档、validator、browser 和 packed consumer 是同一最终证明链，拆开会产生虚假完成。
granularity.splitSignals: 若 validator 集成需要独立基础设施或外部部署，拆为后续 Feature。

readiness.reason: 依赖、证据矩阵、baseline 分类和退出标准明确。

forwardImpact.resolution: 同步 HTML-first 规则、例外和命令。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: Offline HTML conformance gate, Portal rendered-document/browser coverage, package guidance, CI wiring, and final repository-wide regression evidence.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Authored and representative rendered HTML conform; migrated public components retain behavior; documentation and CI enforce the HTML-first rule; full Portal, consumer, packed-consumer, type, build, unit, MCP, catalog and design gates pass.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Programmatic html-validate output, full browser/type/build/unit/package matrices, workflow integrity, and review of any skip or baseline finding.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: The standards gate and documentation can be reverted independently, but semantic component migrations must only be reverted with equivalent standards evidence.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Pinned html-validate 11.5.6; added an offline source/document gate and CI command; added rendered-page conformance and migrated-component browser assertions; standardized authored documents; published HTML-first package guidance; updated Portal demos; fixed two source-highlight variable annotations to restore the pre-existing consumer typecheck baseline.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: The repository now has executable prevention at source and rendered-document layers plus complete behavioral and packaging regression evidence for the public library.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: Complex widgets without behaviorally equivalent native controls remain custom; the token/foundation contract, product routing, and component visual language are unchanged.

changeSurface.documentationAnchors: packages/ui/docs/HTML-STANDARDS.md; packages/ui/AGENTS.md; README.md; DO-AND-DONT.md; COMPONENT-CATALOG.md; R-SWQT-0001.
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: No data migration; exported PopoverSelect prop surface gains native select attributes and Progress drops its Radix peer.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Use html-validate's programmatic API because its v11 CLI calls fs.globSync unavailable in the repository Node runtime; suppress style/security/a11y heuristics that are not HTML conformance rules; validate representative complete rendered documents in both themes.
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: The pre-existing source-highlight type failures were repaired with explicit string annotations so the full required consumer typecheck could produce usable evidence.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: An initial MCP smoke failure was caused by a parallel Portal build rewriting generated files; the serial rerun passed. Validator.nu CSS observations were non-structural and are not promoted to HTML failures.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: bun run check:html-standards; representative rendered-document browser grep
validationReferences.notes: 8 component contracts, 2 authored documents, and light/dark rendered pages.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: design-contract; catalog-export; Portal/consumer typecheck, unit, build and MCP smoke
validationReferences.notes: Catalog reports 88 catalog exports, 309 package exports and 88 demos; MCP smoke passed on the serial rerun.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: Portal full browser; consumer full browser; verify:packed-consumer
validationReferences.notes: Portal 56 passed; consumer 34 passed with 6 declared skips; packed nested and workspace-hoisted layouts each 34 passed with the same 6 declared skips.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: sync-docs:check; npm publish audit; git diff --check; sw doctor; workflow layout/closure/lifecycle
validationReferences.notes: Publish audit has 0 blocking findings and 4 reviewed URL warnings; workflow numbering retains legacy policy findings.

blocker.reason: All product, conformance, packaging, documentation and workflow closure gates required by this Step pass.
blocker.recoveryTrigger: A supported browser, consumer package layout or future HTML/ARIA rule invalidates a native migration or checker configuration.
blocker.residualRisk: Real assistive-technology navigation and very large ServerDataTable datasets remain appropriate manual/future performance checks.

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: not-needed: new commands and rules are recorded in root scripts, CI, package guidance and the research record; no companion path/config fact changed.

items.guardedRiskDomain: Public component semantics/API, full rendered documents, browser interaction/layout, package consumption, and durable CI governance.

gateOutcomes.evidence: S0022 is implemented; R-SWQT-0001 uses current WHATWG/ARIA sources; implementation stays within HTML semantics, conformance, regression and documentation scope.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: inspected retained Radix/custom widgets and neutral containers for false-positive native migrations; their behavior or lack of stronger semantics justifies retention.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Future platform additions may change the native-equivalence decision.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Offline source/document and rendered-document checks pass; full Portal/consumer/browser/type/build/unit/MCP/catalog/design/packed matrices pass.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: checked redundant roles, hidden accessible ellipsis text, fake links, split tables, missing th scope, custom simple selection, Progress API/ref behavior, sort and native radio/select keyboard behavior.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Real AT combinations and very large data tables are not exhaustively automated.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Package Agent/docs, research record, CI, scripts, Portal demos/tests and stable workflow records agree; sync-docs, publish audit, workflow layout/closure/lifecycle and sw doctor pass.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: html-validate style/security/a11y heuristics were separated from normative conformance; six browser skips are declared project-matrix skips; four publish warnings are reviewed public/internal documentation URLs with zero blockers.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: workflow-numbering remains a known repository policy baseline and is outside this Feature.

items.testSufficiency: passed: all ten Feature acceptance directions map to direct source, rendered, interaction, package or governance evidence.
items.conditionalGates: DDL not-applicable; no ignored product test failure; initial parallel MCP smoke contamination was reproduced as generated-file race and passed serially.
items.projectCompanionFactDisposition: not-needed(no companion path/command/config fact changed; public rules live in package Agent/docs and root CI scripts).
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: component sources are authoritative; docs and executable gates project the same HTML-first contract.
items.residualRisk: Manual AT sampling and performance/load testing for very large ServerDataTable instances remain sensible release practices, not blockers.
items.followUp: Re-audit when WHATWG/ARIA in HTML or the supported-browser policy changes.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0022-渲染态-html-conformance-回归验证与文档收口.json
items.validationSummary: Offline source/authored/rendered HTML conformance, all Portal/consumer/type/build/unit/browser/package/design/catalog/docs gates, sw doctor and workflow closure passed.
items.testCaseSummary: Portal 56 passed; consumer 34 passed/6 declared skips; packed nested and hoisted layouts each 34 passed/6 declared skips; 8 source contracts, 2 documents and representative light/dark rendered pages conform.
items.coverageSummary: target-driven: all ten Feature acceptance criteria mapped to direct source, DOM, keyboard, Axe, package or governance evidence.
items.rootMount: Stable Layout v3 Step path plus @swqt/ui HTML-STANDARDS guidance and R-SWQT-0001.
items.evidenceInvalidationTrigger: WHATWG/ARIA authoring-rule change, supported-browser policy change, public component API redesign, or standards gate configuration change.
items.archiveSynchronization: implemented(stable Layout v3 path; ledger/registry regenerated)

requirementAudit.requirement: HTML-first policy and traceable exported-library audit
requirementAudit.evidence: R-SWQT-0001, HTML-STANDARDS.md, package Agent/README/Do-and-Don't/catalog guidance, eight executable source contracts.

requirementAudit.requirement: Native basic semantics for progress, navigation, breadcrumb, search, spinner/loading and table headers
requirementAudit.evidence: S0019 source changes plus source and light/dark Portal browser assertions.
requirementAudit.risk: Consumer CSS targeting old internal DOM may need migration.
requirementAudit.followUp: Public native DOM contract is documented; no silent React prop break observed.

requirementAudit.requirement: Native form selection and justified complex-widget boundary
requirementAudit.evidence: S0020 fieldset/legend/radio and select/option migration; Combobox exception documented; keyboard/Axe/type/browser gates pass.
requirementAudit.risk: Native select styling varies by platform.
requirementAudit.followUp: Prefer native behavior unless product requirements establish non-equivalence.

requirementAudit.requirement: Single semantic data table and header association
requirementAudit.evidence: S0021 single table/thead/tbody, default scope=col, sticky/sort source and browser proof.
requirementAudit.risk: Very large datasets and real AT navigation are not exhaustively automated.

requirementAudit.requirement: Offline conformance, full regression, packaging and durable CI governance
requirementAudit.evidence: html-validate 11.5.6 programmatic gate, rendered-page tests, full Portal/consumer/packed matrices, CI, docs sync, publish audit and sw doctor.
requirementAudit.risk: html-validate CLI is incompatible with the current Node fs API surface.
requirementAudit.followUp: Keep the tested programmatic API path or revisit after runtime/tool upgrades.

items.workflowRunAudit: S0019-S0022 each completed implementation, review and promotion; final incremental ledger and delivered registry are regenerated.
items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: Research, Feature, four stable Step documents, review records, registry and completion evidence are connected; temporary fixtures are removed after promotion.
items.documentGovernanceAudit: Authoritative component source, package guidance, CI scripts, Portal examples/tests and research conclusion agree on the native-equivalence rule.
items.ssotProjectionAudit: Runtime source is authoritative; documentation and executable source/rendered checks project the same contract with no shadow state.
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: Repository-local workflow fixture files are deleted after controlled writes; system temporary reports are non-authoritative.
items.acceptanceToAuthorityPropagation: All ten Feature criteria propagate from standards research to component source, Portal demo/rendered DOM, checks/CI, package docs and workflow records.

closingTriad.question: Any unimplemented or unregistered Feature work?
closingTriad.evidence: S0019-S0022 requirement audits and delivered records cover all acceptance criteria.

closingTriad.question: Are registry, ledger, Feature breakdown and stable paths aligned?
closingTriad.evidence: Delivered registry emit, incremental ledger and Feature lifecycle synchronization are final handoff gates.

closingTriad.question: Is behavior verified and every exception/skip classified?
closingTriad.evidence: All product gates pass; 6 browser skips are declared non-applicable matrix cases; 4 publish warnings are reviewed URLs; workflow numbering is an explicit legacy policy baseline.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Standards, API, behavior, package, documentation and workflow evidence are all present.
closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditConsistency: No claimed test is unrun; the initial parallel MCP race is separately recorded with a passing serial rerun.
closingSelfAudit.pluginSkillFriction: html-validate CLI/runtime mismatch required the supported programmatic API; workflow-numbering policy does not model multi-Step Feature numbering.
closingSelfAudit.reusableWorkflowPattern: source contracts + representative rendered conformance + accessibility/interaction matrix
closingSelfAudit.retrospectiveHandoff: Consider improving workflow numbering for one Feature with multiple independently numbered Steps.

items.requiredFollowUp: Re-audit when standards or supported browsers materially change; otherwise none.

validationSummary: Offline source/authored/rendered HTML conformance and all Portal, consumer, package, design, catalog, documentation and workflow closure gates passed.
